recommendations.title: Wonderland
recommendations.overview: In a world where an AI programme allows people to communicate with their deceased loved ones, a flight attendant and a mother question the meaning of reality and humanity.

recommendations.title: The 8th Night
recommendations.overview: With prayer beads in one hand and an ax in the other, a monk hunts down a millennia-old spirit that's possessing humans and unleashing hell on Earth.

recommendations.title: Windstruck
recommendations.overview: Kyung-jin, a police officer who finds herself chasing down a suspected bag-snatcher on her day off. However, the man she catches turns out to be Myungwoo, a passer-by who was himself trying to apprehend the real criminal.

recommendations.title: Burning
recommendations.overview: Deliveryman Jong-su is out on a job when he runs into Hae-mi, a girl who once lived in his neighborhood. She asks if he'd mind looking after her cat while she's away on a trip to Africa. On her return, she introduces to Jong-su an enigmatic young man

recommendations.title: My Sassy Girl
recommendations.overview: A dweeby, mild-mannered man comes to the aid of a drunk young woman on a subway platform. Little does he know how much trouble he’s in for.

recommendations.title: Unlocked
recommendations.overview: A woman's life is turned upside-down when a dangerous man gets a hold of her lost cell phone and uses it to track her every move.

recommendations.title: Oasis
recommendations.overview: A young man released from prison visits the widow of the man he killed drunk-driving and becomes infatuated with his cerebral palsy-stricken daughter.

recommendations.title: Project Silence
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Action, Horror, Science Fiction, Adventure

recommendations.title: Poetry
recommendations.overview: A South Korean woman in her sixties enrolls in a poetry class as she grapples with her faltering memory and her grandson's appalling wrongdoing.

recommendations.title: Cyborg She
recommendations.overview: A lonely university student develops a romance with a beautiful interesting woman, who turns out to be a cyborg from the future.
